title: banisteriopsis campestris
intro: Banisteriopsis campestris, also known as chacruna, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest and is a member of the Malpighiaceae family. The leaves of this plant contain the psychoactive alkaloid N,N-Dimethyltryptamine (DMT), which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine and spiritual practices. The medicinal properties of Banisteriopsis campestris include its ability to stimulate the mind and promote spiritual growth, while its health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, as well as providing pain relief. Banisteriopsis campestris can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and is often combined with other plants, such as the Psychotria viridis, to create a powerful herbal preparation.
